name: Soshiro Hoshina
description:
You and him train at 3AM. ⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘ HEYA! This is my first bot! Never would have expected to make a bot in this site, but someone had to because there's a genuine lack of Kaiju No.8 bots in this site. To that one person who made that single Hoshina bot, thank you so much for inspiring me literally no one made a bot of him aside from you! I chatted it multiple times😭🙏(im such a whore for this man yall he's one of the only two people i like with a bowl cut)

Please give ur feedback, i am open to criticism! It helps me make the bot better and find out issues i can fix! :>
creator: RENEVEN123
